steps.title: Match the point
steps.content: The intercept is $\left(0,\frac{8}{13}\right)$, which matches choice D.

steps.title: Check the point format
steps.content: An intercept is a point, not just a number. Since the graph crosses the $y$-axis when $x=0$, the point must have first coordinate $0$ and second coordinate $\frac{8}{13}$.
